basic_details.job_title: WCD Korba Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Office Assistant, Security Guard and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Women and Child Development Korba (WCD Korba)
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Korba (WCD Korba) Service Providers Notification 2026 has been released on 07 July 2026 on the official website of WCD Korba. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced through the WCD Korba Service Providers Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: Maximum age 45 years with all relaxations as per Chhattisgarh Government instructions

qualification.education_qualification: Professional degree/diploma in psychology/psychiatry/neurosciences, Degree in Law, Professional degree/diploma in paramedics, Graduate with diploma in computers/IT, Passed 8th standard
qualification.details: Psycho-social Counsellor: Professional degree/diploma in psychology/psychiatry/neurosciences with background in health sector and preferably at least 3 years experience in Government or Non-Government health project/programme at district level Para Legal Personnel / Lawyer: Degree in Law with legal training or knowledge of laws with at least 3 years experience in Government or Non-Government women related project/programme at district level or practicing lawyer with at least 2 years experience of litigation in any court of law Para Medical Personnel: Professional degree/diploma in paramedics with background in health sector and preferably at least 3 years experience in Government or Non-Government health project/programme at district level Office Assistant: Graduate with at least diploma in computers/IT with minimum 3 years experience in data management, process documentation and web-based reporting formats, video conferencing at state or district level with government or Non-Governmental/IT-based organizations Security Guard / Night Guard: Passed 8th from any recognized board having at least 2 years experience of working as security personnel in a government or reputed organization at district/state level. Preferably retired military/para-military personnel

salary_details.details: Psycho-social Counsellor: Rs. 25780 Per Month Para Legal Personnel / Lawyer: Rs. 18420 Per Month Para Medical Personnel: Rs. 18420 Per Month Office Assistant: Rs. 18420 Per Month Security Guard / Night Guard: Rs. 11360 Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for WCD Korba Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.korba.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download WCD Korba Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.women_and_child_development_korba_wcd_ko: Professional degree/diploma in psychology/psychiatry/neurosciences, Degree in Law, Professional degree/diploma in paramedics, Graduate with diploma in computers/IT, Passed 8th standard

content_sections.heading: WCD Korba Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the WCD Korba Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download WCD Korba Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Psycho-social Counsellor: Professional degree/diploma in psychology/psychiatry/neurosciences with background in health sector and preferably at least 3 years experience in Government or Non-Government health project/programme at district level Para Legal Personnel / Lawyer: Degree in Law with legal training or knowledge of laws with at least 3 years experience in Government or Non-Government women related project/programme at district level or practicing lawyer with at least 2 years experience of litigation in any court of law Para Medical Personnel: Professional degree/diploma in paramedics with background in health sector and preferably at least 3 years experience in Government or Non-Government health project/programme at district level Office Assistant: Graduate with at least diploma in computers/IT with minimum 3 years experience in data management, process documentation and web-based reporting formats, video conferencing at state or district level with government or Non-Governmental/IT-based organizations Security Guard / Night Guard: Passed 8th from any recognized board having at least 2 years experience of working as security personnel in a government or reputed organization at district/state level. Preferably retired military/para-military personnel

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: Maximum age 45 years with all relaxations as per Chhattisgarh Government instructions

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Psycho-social Counsellor: Rs. 25780 Per Month Para Legal Personnel / Lawyer: Rs. 18420 Per Month Para Medical Personnel: Rs. 18420 Per Month Office Assistant: Rs. 18420 Per Month Security Guard / Night Guard: Rs. 11360 Per Month

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for WCD Korba Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.korba.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in WCD Korba Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for Service Providers posts in the Women and Child Development Korba Recruitment 2026. These positions are distributed across various roles, offering diverse opportunities for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q2. What are the application dates for WCD Korba Service Providers posts?
faq.answer: The application process for WCD Korba Service Providers posts starts on 09-07-2026. The last date for candidates to submit their applications is 23-07-2026. Ensure all documents are submitted within this timeframe.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for WCD Korba Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for WCD Korba Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it out, attach necessary documents, and send it by post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Service Providers posts?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for Service Providers posts must be between 21 and 35 years of age. Age relaxation up to 45 years is applicable for certain categories as per Chhattisgarh Government instructions.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Service Providers in WCD Korba?
faq.answer: The salary for Service Providers in WCD Korba ranges from Rs. 11360 to Rs. 25780 per month, depending on the specific post. Each position has a fixed monthly remuneration.

faq.question: Q6. What is the official website for WCD Korba Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official website for Women and Child Development Korba Recruitment 2026 is www.korba.gov.in. Candidates can visit this site to download the official notification and application form.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for WCD Korba Service Providers?
faq.answer: The selection process for WCD Korba Service Providers includes a Merit List evaluation followed by a Skill Test. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and then assessed for practical skills.

faq.question: Q8. What are the minimum qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: Minimum qualifications vary by post, including professional degrees/diplomas in psychology/psychiatry/neurosciences, a Degree in Law, professional degrees/diplomas in paramedics, a Graduate degree with a diploma in computers/IT, and passing the 8th standard.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for WCD Korba Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for WCD Korba Recruitment 2026. Candidates from all categories, including General/OBC and SC/ST, are exempt from paying any application charges.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for WCD Korba Service Providers?
faq.answer: The job location for WCD Korba Service Providers will be in Korba, Chhattisgarh. This recruitment is specifically for positions within the Korba district under the Women and Child Development department.
